blocks.text: The MICU simplifies circuitry and improves maintainability by centralizing control of door locks, wipers/washers, lighting, etc. The MICU functions include control functions that control lights, door locks, and other loads and communicate information output based on input information from each switch and B-CAN, as well as self-fault diagnosis, external fault diagnosis, and customized memory functions. In addition, the MICU has a self-failure diagnosis function, an external failure diagnosis function, and a customized memory function.
